specific_question: How many people attended the annual marketing and business solutions summit organized by MediConn Solutions marketing team in June 2022?
answer: MediConn Solutions’ annual marketing and business solutions summit in June 2022 attracted 120 attendees from across different departments of the company.
dr_question: Starting in 2026 through Q1 2027, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the use of AI in creating the right patient experience, starting from the first touch point through care delivery and follow up to increase the number of patients that engage with their tele-health services?
